core_mechanism: hypoelliptic regularity propagation: a degenerate (non-elliptic) differential operator whose generating vector fields together with their iterated commutators (Lie brackets) span every direction forces its solutions to inherit a fine smoothness/regularity class (Hormander bracket-generating condition)
brief_reason: The abstract studies the ultradifferentiable regularity of solutions and vectors of a Hormander-type class of hypoelliptic differential operators, i.e. how a degenerate operator still forces its solutions into a prescribed regularity class.
